description: Build core X growth strategy for both EN and JP accounts. Three phases: (1) Scout: collect fresh competitor data for all tracked competitors in both markets + fetch these 5 specific tweets via X API for growth insights: https://x.com/reon_x_1000man/status/2026979693300473887, https://x.com/maind200/status/2026972006340768107, https://x.com/seisei_ai_1st/status/2014167228024021283, https://x.com/seisei_ai_1st/status/1982644880338976976, https://x.com/seisei_ai_1st/status/2013805338433359994. (2) Scout analysis: deep dive into competitor patterns + extract growth tactics from the shared tweets. (3) Strategist: synthesize everything into a core growth strategy document at data/core_strategy.json covering account positioning, content pillars, image style guidelines, posting cadence, hashtag strategy per market, engagement approach, EN vs JP tactics. This is the foundational playbook, not a daily strategy — it should be durable and principle-based.
notes: Operator wants a foundational core strategy (not daily). The 5 shared links are Japanese AI growth accounts sharing tips — fetch via X API since web scraping failed. Strategy should serve as the guiding document for all future daily content and image generation.
